name: Inure
desc: An elegant and beautiful premium Android app manager with Root and Shizuku support, a built-in terminal, analytics, virustotal, debloat, stats and various othe…
descFull: An elegant and beautiful premium Android app manager with Root and Shizuku support, a built-in terminal, analytics, virustotal, debloat, stats and various other features with a custom theme engine, developed with purely custom UI design and reproducible build.
